summary: Completed testing of P1-P3 features for StatMoose. All backend API tests passed (11/11). Frontend pricing page verified with trial period text and buttons. Code review confirmed all implementations are correct.
critical_code_review_comments: EmbedSnippetGenerator component exists but is not yet imported/used in any parent component - may need integration
seed_data_creation: Created test admin user with school_id and school_role for season clone testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1-P3 features fully tested. Trial periods, season clone, and redo functionality all working correctly.

details.packages_endpoint: GET /api/payments/packages returns trial_days field for all packages
details.pricing_page_ui: Shows '14-day free trial' text for Silver and Gold, 'Start Free Trial' buttons

details.features: iframe code, responsive embed with auto-resize, link button options
details.note: Component is created but not yet integrated into parent components

details.response: Returns season_id, season object, and stats (roster_cloned, roster_count, games_cloned, team_id)

details.LiveGame_jsx: Has handleRedo function, redoAction state, Redo2 icon button (appears when redoAction available)
details.BaseballLiveGame_jsx: Has Redo button next to Undo button with canRedo check and redoLength display

GET /api/payments/packages.details: Returns all packages with trial_days field

GET /api/payments/tier-features/gold.details: Returns gold tier features (embed_widgets: true, white_label_embeds: true)

POST /api/schools/{school_id}/seasons/{s.details: Successfully clones season with roster and schedule options

ui_elements_verified: Bronze tier card with 'FREE' price and 'GET STARTED' button
Silver tier card with '$15/MONTH' price, '14-DAY FREE TRIAL' text, 'START FREE TRIAL' button
Gold tier card with '$20/MONTH' price, '14-DAY FREE TRIAL' text, 'START FREE TRIAL' button
Feature comparison table with all tiers

useGameHistory.js.exports: saveStateForUndo, popLastState, redoLastState, clearHistory, canUndo, canRedo, historyLength, redoLength
